data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for seat preferences, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions 'Seat preferences (aisle vs middle)' as a need, yet the evidence does not include any API responses or state checks that demonstrate how seat preferences are handled or stored. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of how seat preferences (aisle vs middle) are implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
